analysis_scope.question: Build a valuation-free disclosure-grounded thesis using 10-K, 10-Q, and 8-K only.

coverage_summary.notes: Included claims: 3. Excluded claims: 1. Missing topics: material_events.

executive_summary.summary: Amazon serves developers and enterprises of all sizes, including start-ups, government agencies, and academic institutions, through AWS, which offers a broad set of on-demand technology services. The increase in North America operating income for the nine months ended September 30, 2025, compared to the comparable prior year period, is primarily due to increased unit sales.

watchpoints.title: 10-Q Recent Quarter Change
watchpoints.claim: The increase in North America operating income for the nine months ended September 30, 2025, compared to the comparable prior year period, is primarily due to increased unit sales and increased advertising sales, partially offset by increased fulfillment, technology and infrastructure, other operating, and shipping costs.

final_investment_thesis.thesis: Verified disclosures show that the increase in North America operating income for the nine months ended September 30, 2025, compared to the comparable prior year period, is primarily due to increased unit sales and increased advertising sales, partially offset by increased fulfillment, technology and infrastructure, other operating, and shipping costs. Additional filing support shows that Amazon serves developers and enterprises of all sizes, including start-ups, government agencies, and academic institutions, through AWS, which offers a broad set of on-demand technology services, including compute, storage, database, analytics, artificial intelligence and machine learning, and other services.
final_investment_thesis.uncertainty_statement: The conclusion remains uncertainty-aware because some signals are only partially supported or coverage is incomplete.

excluded_claims.title: Item 8.01 - Other Events
excluded_claims.claim: On March 13, 2026, Amazon.com, Inc. completed the sale of various series of notes, including floating and fixed-rate notes with maturities extending to 2076. The aggregate principal amount of these notes totaled $36.898 billion, yielding estimated net proceeds of approximately $36.813 billion from the offering.
excluded_claims.summary: On March 13, 2026, Amazon.com, Inc. completed the sale of various series of notes, including floating and fixed-rate notes with maturities extending to 2076. The aggregate principal amount of these notes totaled $36.898 billion, yielding estimated net proceeds of approximately $36.813 billion from the offering.

evidence_refs.excerpt: On March 13, 2026, Amazon.com, Inc. (the “Company”) closed the sale of $1,750,000,000 aggregate principal amount of its floating rate notes due 2028 (the “2028 Floating Rate Notes”)...
